title: Rise of Early-Onset Cancers
description: Why is the incidence of sporadic, early-onset colorectal and metabolic cancers rising rapidly in adults under 50?

title: Vitamin-Microbiome Bidirectional Loop
description: How does the gut microbiome produce and interact with dietary and supplementary vitamins to regulate systemic host metabolism?

title: Periodontal Pathology and Alzheimer's Link
description: Does Porphyromonas gingivalis migration from the gum line to the hippocampus drive amyloid-beta, tau, and ubiquitin neurodegeneration?

title: VO2max Retention and Cardiorespiratory Aging
description: How does maintaining exceptionally high cardiorespiratory fitness in multi-marathoners alter the aging trajectory of VO2max and lower all-cause mortality?

title: Phytochemical Regulation of Aging Pathways
description: How do dietary plant compounds (xenohormetic signals like sulforaphane, EGCG, and resveratrol) regulate Nrf2, AMPK, and SIRT1 pathways?

title: When the Body Says No (Gabor Maté)
description: How does chronic, hidden stress and emotional suppression downregulate immune function and trigger autoimmune and cardiovascular pathologies?
